text.title: vui-conversation-design Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Code branches scattered across handlers; dialog gets into loop where same state plays repeatedly.
antipattern.root-cause: No state machine declared; flow emerged in code.
antipattern.fix: Author state-machine spec first; engineering consumes it.

antipattern.symptom: Voice asks 'What did you say?' 7 times; user abandons.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 3; fourth miss escalates to fallback or human.

antipattern.symptom: Voice reads 'Click Continue to proceed to the next page'; nonsense to listener.
antipattern.root-cause: Same content field used for both modalities.
antipattern.fix: Separate voice_script and screen_prompt; author each natively.

antipattern.symptom: Lab tests 99% intent accuracy; real-user in noisy car drops to 65%.
antipattern.fix: Mandate ≥3 noise conditions in test plan.
